debug_info.goal:
rec :
  (P Q : Prop) →
    (motive : Disjunction P Q → Type) →
      ((hp : P) → motive (Disjunction.left P Q hp)) →
        ((hq : Q) → motive (Disjunction.right P Q hq)) → (h : Disjunction P Q) → motive h
comp_left :
  ∀ (P Q : Prop) (motive : Disjunction P Q → Type) (h_left : (hp : P) → motive (Disjunction.left P Q hp))
    (h_right : (hq : Q) → motive (Disjunction.right P Q hq)) (hp : P),
    rec P Q motive h_left h_right (Disjunction.left P Q hp) = h_left hp
comp_right :
  ∀ (P Q : Prop) (motive : Disjunction P Q → Type) (h_left : (hp : P) → motive (Disjunction.left P Q hp))
    (h_right : (hq : Q) → motive (Disjunction.right P Q hq)) (hq : Q),
    rec P Q motive h_left h_right (Disjunction.right P Q hq) = h_right hq
⊢ False

proof:
let f := rec True True (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false)
  have h₁ : f (left True.intro) = true := comp_left _ _ _ _ _ True.intro
  have h₂ : f (right True.intro) = false := comp_right _ _ _ _ _ True.intro
  have : left True.intro = right True.intro := rfl
  rw [this] at h₁
  rw [h₁] at h₂
  contradiction
failed_attempts:
let f := rec True True (fun _ => Type) (fun _ => Unit) (fun _ => Empty)
  have h : f (left True.intro) = f (right True.intro) := congrArg f rfl
  rw [comp_left, comp_right] at h
  exact Empty.elim (cast h Unit.unit)

let f := rec True True (fun _ ↦ Type) (fun _ ↦ Bool) (fun _ ↦ Nat)
  have h : Bool = Nat := by
    rw [← comp_left True True _ _ _ True.intro, ← comp_right True True _ _ _ True.intro]
    congr; rfl
  let P (T : Type) := ∃ x y z : T, x ≠ y ∧ x ≠ z ∧ y ≠ z
  have h₁ : P Nat := ⟨0, 1, 2, by decide, by decide, by decide⟩
  have h₂ : ¬ P Bool := by
    intro ⟨x, y, z, _, _, _⟩
    cases x <;> cases y <;> cases z <;> contradiction
  rw [h] at h₂
  exact h₂ h₁

let f := rec True True (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false)
  let l : Disjunction True True := left True.intro
  let r : Disjunction True True := right True.intro
  have : true = false := by
    rw [← comp_left _ _ _ _ _ True.intro]
    rw [show l = r by rfl]
    rw [comp_right _ _ _ _ _ True.intro]
  contradiction

let f := rec True True (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false)
  have h₁ : f (left True.intro) = true := comp_left _ _ _ _ _ _
  have h₂ : f (right True.intro) = false := comp_right _ _ _ _ _ _
  have : left True.intro = right True.intro := rfl
  rw [this] at h₁
  rw [h₁] at h₂
  contradiction

let f := rec True True (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false)
  have h : left True.intro = right True.intro := rfl
  have : f (left True.intro) = f (right True.intro) := congrArg f h
  rw [comp_left, comp_right] at this
  contradiction

let l : Disjunction True True := left True.intro
  let r : Disjunction True True := right True.intro
  have h_eq : l = r := rfl
  let motive (_ : Disjunction True True) := Type
  let h_left (_ : True) := Unit
  let h_right (_ : True) := Empty
  let f := rec True True motive h_left h_right
  have hl : f l = Unit := comp_left True True motive h_left h_right True.intro
  have hr : f r = Empty := comp_right True True motive h_left h_right True.intro
  rw [h_eq, hr] at hl
  exact (cast hl ()).elim

let f := rec True True (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false)
  have h₁ : f (left True.intro) = true := comp_left _ _ _ _ _ _
  have h₂ : f (right True.intro) = false := comp_right _ _ _ _ _ _
  have : left True.intro = right True.intro := rfl
  rw [this] at h₁
  rw [h₁] at h₂
  contradiction

have h : (left True.intro : Disjunction True True) = right True.intro := rfl
  have h1 := comp_left True True (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false) True.intro
  have h2 := comp_right True True (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false) True.intro
  rw [h] at h1
  rw [h1] at h2
  contradiction

have : true = false := by
    rw [← comp_left True True (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false) True.intro]
    rw [← comp_right True True (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false) True.intro]
    congr; rfl
  contradiction

let f := rec True True (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false)
  have h1 : f (left True.intro) = true := comp_left _ _ _ _ _ _
  have h2 : f (right True.intro) = false := comp_right _ _ _ _ _ _
  rw [show left True.intro = right True.intro from rfl] at h1
  rw [h1] at h2
  contradiction

let f := rec True True (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false)
  have h₁ : f (left True.intro) = true := comp_left _ _ _ _ _ _
  have h₂ : f (right True.intro) = false := comp_right _ _ _ _ _ _
  have : left True.intro = right True.intro := rfl
  rw [this] at h₁
  rw [h₁] at h₂
  contradiction

let f := rec True True (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false)
  have h₁ : f (left True.intro) = true := comp_left _ _ _ _ _ _
  have h₂ : f (right True.intro) = false := comp_right _ _ _ _ _ _
  rw [show left True.intro = right True.intro from rfl] at h₁
  rw [h₁] at h₂
  contradiction

let F := rec True True (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false)
  have h₁ : F (left True.intro) = true := comp_left _ _ _ _ _ _
  have h₂ : F (right True.intro) = false := comp_right _ _ _ _ _ _
  have : left True.intro = right True.intro := rfl
  rw [this] at h₁
  rw [h₁] at h₂
  cases h₂

let f := rec True True (fun _ ↦ Bool) (fun _ ↦ true) (fun _ ↦ false)
  have h₁ : f (left True.intro) = true := comp_left _ _ _ _ _ True.intro
  have h₂ : f (right True.intro) = false := comp_right _ _ _ _ _ True.intro
  rw [← h₂] at h₁
  contradiction

let d1 : Disjunction True True := left True.intro
  let d2 : Disjunction True True := right True.intro
  have : d1 = d2 := Subsingleton.elim _ _
  have h1 := comp_left True True (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false) True.intro
  have h2 := comp_right True True (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false) True.intro
  rw [this] at h1
  rw [h1] at h2
  contradiction

let l : Disjunction True True := left True.intro
  let r : Disjunction True True := right True.intro
  have h_eq : l = r := rfl
  let f := rec True True (fun _ => Nat) (fun _ => 0) (fun _ => 1)
  have hl : f l = 0 := comp_left _ _ _ _ _ _
  have hr : f r = 1 := comp_right _ _ _ _ _ _
  rw [h_eq, hl] at hr
  contradiction

let f := rec True True (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false)
  have h₁ : f (left True.intro) = true := comp_left _ _ _ _ _ _
  have h₂ : f (right True.intro) = false := comp_right _ _ _ _ _ _
  have : left True.intro = right True.intro := rfl
  rw [this] at h₁
  rw [h₁] at h₂
  contradiction

let l : Disjunction True True := left True.intro
  let r : Disjunction True True := right True.intro
  let f := rec True True (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false)
  have h₁ : f l = true := comp_left _ _ _ _ _ _
  have h₂ : f r = false := comp_right _ _ _ _ _ _
  have : l = r := rfl
  rw [this, h₂] at h₁
  contradiction

have : true = false := by
    rw [← comp_left True True (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false) True.intro]
    rw [← comp_right True True (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false) True.intro]
    congr
  contradiction

let f := rec True True (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false)
  have h₁ : f (left trivial) = true := comp_left _ _ _ _ _ _
  have h₂ : f (right trivial) = false := comp_right _ _ _ _ _ _
  have : left trivial = right trivial := rfl
  rw [this] at h₁
  rw [h₁] at h₂
  contradiction
successful_attempts:

  have h₁ : f (left True.intro) = true := comp_left _ _ _ _ _ True.intro
  have h₂ : f (right True.intro) = false := comp_right _ _ _ _ _ True.intro

let f := rec True True (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false)
  have h₁ : f (left True.intro) = true := comp_left _ _ _ _ _ True.intro
  have h₂ : f (left True.intro) = false := comp_right _ _ _ _ _ True.intro

let f := rec True True (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false)
  have h₁ : f (left trivial) = true := comp_left _ _ _ _ _ trivial
  have h₂ : f (right trivial) = false := comp_right _ _ _ _ _ trivial
  have : left trivial = right trivial := Subsingleton.elim _ _
  rw [this] at h₁
  rw [h₁] at h₂
  contradiction

let f := rec True True (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false)
  have h₁ : f (left True.intro) = true := comp_left _ _ _ _ _ True.intro
  have h₂ : f (right True.intro) = false := comp_right _ _ _ _ _ True.intro

let f := rec True True (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false)
  have h₁ : f (left trivial) = true := comp_left _ _ _ _ _ trivial
  have h₂ : f (right trivial) = false := comp_right _ _ _ _ _ trivial
  have h_eq : left trivial = right trivial := rfl
  rw [h_eq] at h₁
  rw [h₁] at h₂

let f := rec True True (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false)
  have h₁ : f (left True.intro) = true := comp_left _ _ _ _ _ True.intro
  have h₂ : f (right True.intro) = false := comp_right _ _ _ _ _ True.intro
  have : left True.intro = right True.intro := rfl
  rw [this] at h₁
  rw [h₁] at h₂
  contradiction

let f := rec True True (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false)
  have h₁ : f (left True.intro) = true := comp_left True True _ _ _ True.intro
  have h₂ : f (right True.intro) = false := comp_right True True _ _ _ True.intro
  have h_eq : left (P := True) (Q := True) True.intro = right True.intro := rfl
  rw [h_eq] at h₁
  rw [h₁] at h₂
  contradiction

let f := rec True True (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false)
  have h1 : f (left True.intro) = true := comp_left _ _ _ _ _ True.intro
  have h2 : f (right True.intro) = false := comp_right _ _ _ _ _ True.intro
  have : left True.intro = right True.intro := rfl
  rw [this] at h1
  rw [h1] at h2
  contradiction

let f := rec True True (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false)
  have h1 : f (left True.intro) = true :=
    comp_left True True (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false) True.intro
  have h2 : f (right True.intro) = false :=
    comp_right True True (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false) True.intro
  have h_eq : left True.intro = right True.intro := rfl
  rw [h_eq] at h1
  rw [h1] at h2
  contradiction

have : true = false := Eq.trans
    (comp_left True True (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false) True.intro).symm
    (comp_right True True (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false) True.intro)
  contradiction

let f := rec True True (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false)
  have h₁ : f (left True.intro) = true := comp_left _ _ _ _ _ True.intro
  have h₂ : f (right True.intro) = false := comp_right _ _ _ _ _ True.intro
  have : (left True.intro : Disjunction True True) = right True.intro := rfl
  rw [this] at h₁
  rw [h₁] at h₂
  contradiction

let f := rec True True (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false)
  have h₁ : f (left trivial) = true := comp_left _ _ _ _ _ trivial
  have h₂ : f (right trivial) = false := comp_right _ _ _ _ _ trivial
  have : left trivial = right trivial := rfl
  rw [this] at h₁
  rw [h₁] at h₂
  contradiction
